description_long: This is a rectangular, portable radio receiver with a predominantly orange front panel and black sides and back. The front features a large black speaker grille on the left, and a digital display on the right showing 'FM100.60 MHz' along with a small flag icon. Below the display are two colored buttons (yellow and red) and two small black buttons, likely for tuning and power. The top of the radio has a long, thin, black telescopic antenna that can be extended or retracted. The side view reveals volume or tuning buttons marked with plus and minus symbols, as well as a switch. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, garages, or sidewalks.
description: A compact, rectangular orange and black radio receiver with a digital display, speaker grille, buttons, and a telescopic antenna. Designed for portable use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the speaker grille, digital display, colored buttons, and part of the antenna.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plus and minus buttons and a switch, with the antenna visible from the top.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain black back and the full length of the antenna.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal features visible, mainly the radio's profile and antenna.
